framework_version_stale_exempt_reason: Feature substantively shipped under v7.9.1 (field + gate + backfill, 2026-06-07 PR #662). Closure is a v7.10-era B15 calibration event (advisory→enforced flip PR #781); framework_version intentionally records the shipping era, not the closure date.
isolation_opt_out_reason: Stub-only PR created on the same chore/ branch as the F6 CLAUDE.md edit during Phase E exit batch — Mode C bypass needed for the initial research-phase scaffold commit. The feature/t14-platform-parity-state-field branch will be opened for Phase 1 PRD work (the real implementation).
primary_metric: Number of complete-phase transitions where platforms_tested is populated and non-empty
success_metrics: 100% of new current_phase=complete transitions post-promotion carry non-empty platforms_tested (T1, measured via gate-coverage.jsonl)
Zero false positives during 14-day advisory→enforced calibration window
Backfill of 85 existing complete features done in single mechanical PR (T1, measured by grep)
kill_criteria: False positive rate >5% during advisory calibration window — gate flags legitimately-platformless features (e.g., framework-meta features that touch no platform)
Operator burden — operators routinely struggle to identify platforms_tested values OR consistently leave field empty post-backfill (signal: >20% of new complete transitions have empty array)
Field semantics unclear in practice — operators ask >3 times what 'backend' or 'ai' means in a 30-day window
kill_criteria_resolution: B15 calibration 2026-06-21 (advisory window 2026-06-07 PR #662 -> 2026-06-21): all 3 kill criteria not_fired. K1 (false-positive >5%): not_fired [T1 - 0 failure rows across 16 real complete-transition checks in PLATFORMS_TESTED coverage key; all 1470 skips legitimate]. K2 (operator burden >20% empty arrays): not_fired [T1 - 0 platforms_tested_empty findings on real transitions; backfill populated all pre-T14 complete features]. K3 (semantics unclear >3 asks/30d): not_fired [T2 - no operator clarification requests logged]. Verdict: PROMOTE -> PLATFORMS_TESTED_ADVISORY_MODE flipped True->False (enforced). Reversible via single-flag revert.
dispatch_pattern: agent-driven (schema + gate code + backfill + dev-guide update)
scope_summary: Adds `platforms_tested: {ios: bool, web: bool, backend: bool, ai: bool}` field to state.json schema. Extends FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS gate (currently advisory at v7.9.1, was enforced at v7.9) to require non-empty platforms_tested at current_phase=complete transition. Backfill on 85 existing complete features in single mechanical commit. Ships advisory mode in v7.9.1; advisory → enforced flip at next promotion window (~v7.10) following 14-day Mechanism A calibration. Scope explicitly OUT: per-platform test-coverage metrics (separate T15+ work item).

research.notes: Stub created 2026-06-04 (Phase E exit batch). Research completed 2026-06-07 in research.md: Q1 — deterministic file-glob backfill heuristic + provenance flag (0 mandatory manual review); Q2 — framework-meta features EXEMPT via existing work_subtype/work_type/case_study_type predicate (no all-false); Q3 — 14-day advisory→enforced calibration per v7.9 precedent.

prd.notes: PRD authored at prd.md — field spec locked ({ios,web,backend,ai} booleans + platforms_tested_provenance), success metrics + kill criteria pre-registered, 9-task plan with F16 try-repo fixture discipline for T3's new advisory sub-check.

tasks_phase.notes: T1 done (Q1/Q2/Q3 resolved). Task list locked; advanced to implementation per operator 'both in sequence' direction.

implementation.notes: T2+T3 shipped: platforms_tested + provenance schema validation + advisory PLATFORMS_TESTED non-empty-at-complete sub-check (own PLATFORMS_TESTED_ADVISORY_MODE flag + isolated Mechanism A coverage key + Q2 framework-meta exemption) in scripts/check-state-schema.py; 15 unit tests. T4 shipped: scripts/backfill-platforms-tested.py + 9 unit tests; backfilled 94 complete features (25 exempt, 61 inferred, 8 low-confidence flagged for optional spot-check). T5-T9 remaining: dev-guide/CLAUDE.md/glossary, case study + showcase, 14d advisory→enforced calibration.

calendar_gate.phase_e_unblocker: Phase E exit 2026-06-04 unblocked FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS gate extensions per v7.9.1 build window opening. T14 is the 2nd-highest RICE in Theme H of test-coverage master plan (R=8 I=2 C=100% E=0.1w → 160.0).
calendar_gate.rationale: Cannot start before v7.9 promotion + Phase E exit because the gate to extend (FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS) was advisory before 2026-05-21 and stayed in soak through 2026-06-04. Extending an advisory gate would have added telemetry noise during the v7.9 calibration window.
